config.title: Wybór referencji #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#define CTRL_TABMANAGER 100 #define CTRL_CHOICELIST 101 #define CTRL_EDITTO 102 #define CTRL_BUTTONOK 103
#include "50220" CHOICELIST_START( CTRL_CHOICELIST )
' Typeid wybranego obiektu dim g_nTypeID: g_nTypeID = CLng(0)
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Rozpoczyna wybór dzikiej referencji ' ' pSomeObj - sam obiekt ' strWildRefFieldName - nazwa pola z tego obiektu z dziką referencją ' strFields - pola dla dzikich referencji dla wyswietlania i orderby ' oddzielone ";" ' strWheres - where'y dla dzikich ref oddzielone ";" '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function adresat_choose(byref pSomeObj, byval strWildRefFieldName, byval strFields, byval strWheres)
dim pObjDef set pObjDef = pSomeObj.getobjdef
dim nFieldIndex nFieldIndex = pObjDef.getfieldindex( strWildRefFieldName )
dim pFieldDef set pFieldDef = pObjDef.field( nFieldIndex )
dim pFieldsArray set pFieldsArray = trans_.afc.new_navoarray()
pFieldsArray.Separate strFields, ";"
dim pWhereArray set pWhereArray = trans_.afc.new_navoarray()
pWhereArray.Separate strWheres, ";"
dim i: i = 0 while ( pFieldDef.wildreftypeid(i)>0 )
dim strWhere: strWhere = "" if (i<=pWhereArray.UpperIndex()) then strWhere = pWhereArray.Value(i) end if
dim strField: strField = "" if (i<=pFieldsArray.UpperIndex()) then strField = pFieldsArray.Value(i) end if
'Dodaj zakladke dla odpowiedniego typeid wildref_add pFieldDef.wildreftypeid(i), strField, strWhere
i = i + 1 wend
checkEmail
adresat_choose = CLng(page_.domodalauto())
end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Dodaj i zainicjuj zakladke dla obiektu jednego typu ' ' nTypeID - typeid obiektu jakiemu dodac zakladke z wyborem ' strField - pole dla orderby i dla wyświetlania ' strWhere - where dla danego obiektu '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function wildref_add(byval nTypeID, byval strField, byval strWhere) dim pObjDef set pObjDef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef( nTypeID )
dim strObjectName strObjectName = pObjDef.humanname
dim pTabManager set pTabManager = page_.ctrl( CTRL_TABMANAGER )
dim pNewSection set pNewSection = pTabManager.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABITEM, -1)
pNewSection.title = strObjectName
CREATECHOICELIST pNewSection.ident, nTypeId, strField, strWhere, strField, "", nothing end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' EVENT: Wołany na dokonanie wyboru '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- private function ChoiceList_OnChoice(byref pContainer, byval nIdObj, byval nTypeID) g_nTypeID = nTypeID page_.result = nIdObj page_.goback end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zwraca wybrany typeid '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function getTypeID() getTypeID = g_nTypeID end function
dim g_strEmail: g_strEmail = ""
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Sprawdzaj czy wpisano adres e-mail '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function checkEmail() if (trim(g_strEmail)="") then page_.ctrl(CTRL_BUTTONOK).disable = true page_.ctrl(CTRL_BUTTONOK).tip = "Wpisz najpierw adres e-mail w polu Do:" else page_.ctrl(CTRL_BUTTONOK).disable = false page_.ctrl(CTRL_BUTTONOK).tip = "Wciśnij OK aby wybrać ręcznie wpisany adres w polu Do:" end if end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Kontorlka do recznego podania adresu e-mail '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function c##CTRL_EDITTO##_ondataentered(ctrl, value) g_strEmail = value checkEmail c##CTRL_EDITTO##_ondataentered = true end function
function c##CTRL_EDITTO##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) oCtrl.value = g_strEmail c##CTRL_EDITTO##_ongetdata = true end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Dokonano wyboru adresu email recznie podanego '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function email_onchoice() page_.result = -1 page_.goback end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' Zwraca wybrany recznie email '---------------------------------------------------------------------------- function getCustomEmail() getCustomEmail = g_strEmail end function
function setCustomEmail(byval strNewEmail) g_strEmail = strNewEmail end function
